title: helianthus strumosus subsp. decapitatus
intro: Helianthus strumosus subsp. decapitatus, commonly known as prairie sunflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthus strumosus subsp. decapitatus include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health benefits.
